scene.setting: a vast, dark, and cluttered hall with high arched ceilings and numerous shelves filled with objects.

visual_objective.visibility_notes: The scene is very dark, with only a few faint light sources illuminating the central aisle and some shelves. Details of the numerous objects on the shelves are difficult to discern.

audio_description: A low, sustained, and ominous musical chord plays, creating a tense and mysterious atmosphere.
